## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Link the relevant issue: Closes #<issue> -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or improving tests
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build, deps, CI, or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Tests added / updated for the change
- [ ] `docker compose build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed (`.env` is git-ignored)
